title: Deploying podman in tekton pipeline
body:
## What it is
I am having trouble in deploying podman in a tekton pipeline.

## Why
I am deploying a dockerimage scanning solution which requires access do podman.sock to pull images and then do a vulnerability scanning

## Help needed
Is there anyone who had build a Dockerfile for podman where I can call the docker image and then run the podman installer in a tekton task?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @xycloops123!

> Is there anyone who had build a Dockerfile for podman where I can call the docker image and then run the podman installer in a tekton task?

Can you elaborate on that? What does "call the docker image" mean?  Note that I have absolutely no experience with Tekton.
quay.io/podman/stable And friends are the only image we currently ship.  A simple layer on top of that could be used to enable the podman service.  Is that what you are after?

sorry I didnt mention or close this out I used the latest build from quay.io/podman/stable  and got my task executed, thanks for checking in folks. @vrothberg sorry calling the image I meant was pulling the image and having it stored locally inside the tekton task which runs as a container.
